args.svc_yaml:

  replicas: 3
  features:
    flag: true
    note: "alpha"
  timeout: null

app:
  replicas: 3
  features:
    flag: false
    note: 'alpha'
  timeout: null

input_lines:
{"svc_json": "{ invalid json }", "svc_yaml": "app:
  replicas: 3
  features:
    flag: true
    note: "alpha"
  timeout: null
", "svc_xml": "<?xml version="1.0"?><root><item id='1'>old</item><empty></empty><selfclosing attr="x"/></root>"}
focus: Cycle in dependencies + invalid JSON baseline (fallback) + XML declaration and empty tag -> tests attribute parsing, empty-tag to value change, and circular BFS handling.

args.ws_service:

  child: value
  list:
    - a
    - b

parent:
    child: value
  list:
   - a

focus: Whitespace-only indentation changes that should not produce line-level 'modified' reports due to .strip(); structural removal when a service is missing in current; added service present only in current; chain dependencies.
